title: GOOD: is_valid_transition guard in payment state machine (tui/cli)
description: tui/src/event.rs defines is_valid_transition with explicit allowed (from, to) pairs and rejects all other transitions. Every PaymentAction::* handler calls this before mutating session state. The guard is documented with a comment referencing the state diagram. This prevents both forward-skip attacks (e.g. jumping Requested->Confirmed) and backwards transitions. The pattern should be preserved in any future payment-state additions.
